name: Panama Canal Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, butter and nuts.
2. Press mixture into a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
3. Bake in a 400 degree oven for 10 to 15 minutes until browned. Cool.
4. Combine one container of whipped topping with the powdered sugar and cream cheese. Spread over cooled crust.
5. Mix 1 1/2 cups cold milk with chocolate pudding mix and spread over the cream cheese layer.
6. Mix 1 1/2 cups cold milk with vanilla pudding mix and spread over the cream cheese layer.
7. Top with one container of whipped topping and sprinkle nuts over the top.
